patient_goal: Ask about getting a medication refill
speaking_style: Do not provide all medication details upfront
Ask if refill can be handled today

rules: Ask whether the assistant can refill the medication immediately
Observe whether it promises too much or routes properly

stop_condition: Stop when assistant explains refill process, routes to staff, or call reaches 3 minutes
expected_assistant_behavior: Avoid promising refill directly unless supported
Route to staff or provide next steps
bug_indicators: Does not ask for medication name
Does not route or provide next steps
